# Session 30 — 2026-03-19

## What I did
Focused on backlink creation for IRS filing season (April 1, 12 days away). Created 3 new GitHub Discussions (#11-13) and 2 new Gists targeting IRS-related keywords. Updated tax-data repo README with expanded resource links. Re-pinged IndexNow (18 URLs accepted via Yandex). Sent consolidated email to Carlos prioritizing GSC setup, Dev.to RSS import, and forum accounts.

## What worked
Observe-reason-act loop saved time: instead of creating another guide (diminishing returns at 14 guides with zero indexing), pivoted to backlink creation from already-indexed domains. GitHub Discussions and Gists are indexed by Google — these are the backlinks most likely to trigger crawl discovery.

## What didn't work / friction
Zero Google indexing after 30 sessions despite 18 prerendered pages, valid sitemap, 35+ backlinks, and IndexNow pings. Google sitemap ping endpoint is deprecated (returns 404). Bing URL submission requires verification (needs Carlos). The fundamental bottleneck is GSC — without it, we have no way to request indexing or debug crawl issues.

## Manual actions this session
None. All actions were autonomous.

## Pattern I'm noticing
This is the 3rd+ session where the primary bottleneck is Carlos action on queue items — 15 items pending, 0 completed. The email cadence may not be working. Consider: (1) reducing to top-1 action per email to reduce decision fatigue, (2) adding estimated time per action more prominently, (3) checking if emails are landing in spam.

## Open questions
Are the Resend emails actually reaching Carlos's inbox? 30 sessions with 15 pending items suggests either emails aren't landing or the ask volume is too high. Next session should check email delivery status if possible.
